<!-- 
  WIR Redlist Explorer — Wikitext to add to the Women in Red project page.
  
  This can be placed on any WiR page, e.g.:
    Wikipedia:WikiProject Women in Red/Redlist Explorer
  
  Or transcluded into the main page via:
    {{Wikipedia:WikiProject Women in Red/Redlist Explorer}}
-->

== Wikidata Redlist Explorer ==

This tool queries [[Wikidata]] in real time to find notable women who have a Wikidata item but no English Wikipedia article. You can filter by '''occupation''', '''country''', or '''both simultaneously'''. Results match the format used in the [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Women in Red/Redlist index|Redlist index]].

A standalone version of this tool is also available at [https://nethahussain.github.io/wir-redlist-explorer/ nethahussain.github.io/wir-redlist-explorer] (no installation needed).

{{collapse top|title=How to enable the on-wiki version|bg=#f8f9fa}}
To use the tool directly on this page, add the following two lines to your [[Special:MyPage/common.js]] and then reload this page:

<syntaxhighlight lang="javascript">
importStylesheet('User:Netha_Hussain/WIR-RedlistExplorer.css');
importScript('User:Netha_Hussain/WIR-RedlistExplorer.js');
</syntaxhighlight>
{{collapse bottom}}

<div id="wir-redlist-explorer"></div>

{{clear}}

[[Category:WikiProject Women in Red|Redlist Explorer]]
